title: The Seal of Prophethood Which He Had
description: Ibn al-Muthanna-al-Qahhak b. Makhlad1090-'Azrah b. Thabit1091- 'Ilba'1°92-Abu Zayd:1O93 The Messenger of God said to me, "0 Abu Zayd, come close to me and wipe my back," and'°94 1o83. Ibn Sa'd, and Ibn Shabbah (Ta'rikh, II, 607): The pungent musk (or the musk of the utmost excellence). 1084. Muhammad b. Abi Bakr al-Mugaddami died in 234 / 848-49. Ibn Hajar, Tabdbib, IX, 79. Io85. Ibid., XI, 274-75. 1086. Died ca. 136/753 - 54. Ibid., III, 258-59. 1o87. Tabrizi, Mishkut, III, 133; Mishkat (trans.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 09
